/04 — Why verified

Trust isn't a badge. It's the whole point.

01100%ID-verified sellers

Every seller is who they say they are

Listings come only from ID-verified individuals and registered breeders. We check government ID and address before a single companion goes live.

029,200+documents on file

Papers up front, never on trust

Vaccination charts, deworming history and KCI registration are attached to the listing — so you read the records before you ever message.

03< 6 hrsmedian flag-to-removal

Meet before you decide

We hide contact details until you're signed in, encourage in-person visits, and remove illegal, unethical or suspicious listings the moment they're flagged.

Every listing carriesVerified SellerLocation VerifiedVaccination RecordsHome RaisedKCI Certified
/05 — Featured sellers

The people behind the listings.

Every featured seller is ID-verified, address-checked and rated by the families they've placed companions with.

/06 — Voices

/07 — Begin the search

Your companion is out there.

Tell us what you're looking for. We'll send verified matches near you the moment they're listed — dawn-fresh, papers attached.

Trust & Safety

Pet Marketplace is a listing platform that connects pet seekers and sellers. We do not own, sell, or guarantee any companion listed on the platform.

  • Every listing is posted by an ID-verified individual or registered breeder
  • Seekers are responsible for verifying health records, papers and seller identity
  • We strongly recommend meeting the companion in person before any decision

We actively remove illegal, unethical or suspicious listings to keep this a safe community.

Pet Marketplace

India's verified pet marketplace — papers, vaccinations and ratings in the open. Made in Chennai.
